home.heroSubtitle: Learn strategy, RTP, multipliers and play demo version.
home.quickOverview: Gates of Olympus is one of Pragmatic Play's most popular slots. The game uses 6 reels with cluster pays: symbols tumble in cascades, and multipliers up to 500x accumulate and apply to wins. RTP 96.5% and high volatility mean less frequent but larger payouts. The bonus round awards 15 free spins when 4 or more scatters land; in the bonus, multipliers do not reset between spins.
home.whatIsText: Gates of Olympus is a Pragmatic Play slot with a 6×5 grid, cluster pays and cascade mechanics. Multipliers up to 500x accumulate in both base game and free spins. High 96.5% RTP and volatility make it popular with players chasing big wins.
home.strategyText: Manage your bankroll: 1–2% of bank per spin reduces the risk of a quick bust. Use demo mode to learn multiplier and tumble mechanics. In the bonus round multipliers stack — don't give up after the first big hits.
home.demoSubtitle: Play without registration and without risk. Learn the mechanics before playing for real.
home.ctaBlockSubtitle: Redirect to a verified partner. Quick registration.

features.multipliers: Multipliers up to 500x in base and bonus. Stack between cascades.
features.freeSpins: 15 free spins for 4 scatters. Each extra scatter adds 5 more spins.
features.volatility: High volatility: fewer but larger payouts.
features.bonus: Tumbles, cascades, stacking multipliers. No paylines — clusters.
